desc: I found the answer to the ultimate question of life, the universe, and everything!

body: I use words like "thanks" and "please" in my issues: - #16: [enhancement] Adding SMBv1 support - #38: [bug] setuptools CANNOT consider this value unless `scripts` is listed as `dynamic`. - #536: [bug] Could not make a working code example on connecting to LDAP with Kerberos from a linux machine to a Windows Server - #136: HAVE_QT6_SSL is never defined: all TLS code paths are compiled out of every build - #631: [bug] EPM ept_lookup response fails to decode against real servers (entries[] is inline conformant-varying, not ptr) And many more...

desc: I liked my own comment so much that I upvoted it.
I merged a PR with failing checks
body: Pull requests: - #1: [enhancement] UI Improvements - #5: [bugfix] missing scriptExecutor cleanup when closing a tab - #6: [bugfix] missing row bounds check in readScreenText() - #8: [bugfix] lexer silently accepting unterminated string literals - #9: [bugfix] lone trailing $ in variable interpolation - #35: [enhancement] Add CLI option to start a session by its name or a path to a JSON sav… - #43: [enhancement] Created MCP server - #44: [enhancement] Removed file transfer feature for now - #45: [enhancement] same uis for dropdown menus on all target platforms - #47: [bugfix] Fix 5250 screen font size on windows, Fixes #46 - #48: [enhancment] Refactored title bar and menus - #49: [enhancement] Improve lexer of 5250 for windows - #50: [bugfix] Fixed confusion between device type and device name - #51: [bugfix] fixed dedup of device name when empty - #53: [enhancement] Added a way to toggle readonly on a mcp server session, fixes #52 - #54: [enhancement] better handling of font rendering accross all platforms - #55: [enhancement] Improved settings UI - #56: Created an installer for windows - #57: [enhancement] Added PF13-PF24 function keys with Shift - #78: Fix SessionConfig::fromJson accepting out-of-range numeric values (#77) - #80: [bugfix] Fix submodule URLs use SSH breaking anonymous https clone (#79) - #100: [bugfix] Fix placeholder passwords being sent in plaintext SMB1 auth path (#93) - #84: [enhancement] Document git clone command in Linux build instructions (#83) - #86: [enhancement] Add virtual 5250 keyboard with user-configurable key remapping (#85) - #108: [enhancement] Moved kerberos to v5 - #112: [bugfix] Fix APReq.Unmarshal double-wrapping of ticket bytes (#111) - #114: [bugfix] Fix RC4-HMAC usage 9 remap violating RFC 4757 errata (#113) - #118: [enhancement] Add TGSRep.TicketRaw and expose raw service ticket bytes from GetTGS (#117) - #94: [bugfix] Fix Logger::setLogFile leaving m_logStream dangling on reopen failure (#93) - #2: [bug] Fix CI workflows binary name and build path (#1) - #4: [bug] Fix duplicate -d short flag by removing it from --debug (#3) - #2: [bug] Fix -d short flag collision between --debug and --domain (#1) - #6: [bug] Fix LDAP session lifecycle (#5) - #8: [bug] Fix tree rendering prefix for SPNs under last DN (#7) - #4: [bug] Fix release.yaml build step using non-existent src/ directory (#3) - #10: [bug] Honor --debug and --print-spns flags (#9) - #6: [bug] Fix commit.yaml writing build artifact outside the checkout (#5) - #12: [bug] Fix non-ASCII hyphens in workflow filename and name (#11) - #8: [bug] Fix CI workflows pinning Go 1.22.1 while go.mod requires 1.24 (#7) - #12: [bug] Fix main continuing after LDAP connection failure (#11) - #14: [bug] Fix GetAsreproastables rebinding and closing the caller's session (#13) - #16: Fix unused printSPNs variable and stale --print-spns in README (#15) - #96: [bugfix] Fix stale connect-timeout lambda aborting later TN5250 reconnects (#95) - #98: [bugfix] Fix stray std::cout from tn5250 WTD unmarshal by bumping submodule (#97) - #105: [bugfix] Fix garbled document-editor screen by bumping tn5250 submodule (#103) - #461: Fix GetRemoteServerTime returning the zero time (#382) - #535: SMB2: QUERY_INFO/SET_INFO + file management, and MS-FSCC structures (#534) - #719: Add ESE/JET-Blue database reader (windows/database/ese) (#709) - #720: Add offline NTDS.dit account dumping (windows/database/ntds) (#709) - #722: Fix NTDS RID byte order and filter to real accounts (#721) - #723: Add ESE long-value (LV) reassembly (windows/database/ese) - #724: Rework logger on log/slog: levels, with/without timestamps, no-colors, file tee - #725: Migrate LLMNR server logging to the new logger API - #726: Auto-disable logger colours when the output is not a terminal - #727: Migrate last legacy logger call site to new Warnf API - #728: Fix stale trans2 doc comment that contradicts the implementation - #729: Add per-page replication progress callback to MS-DRSR full-NC replication - #733: Fix ncacn_np Recv to retry on transient STATUS_PIPE_EMPTY (#732) - #735: Fix BaseRegQueryValue NDR array framing with pointer count siblings (#734) - #1020: Fix KerberosTime Marshal paths to normalize to UTC (Fixes #1016) - #1021: Fix ccache reader to reject negative lengths (Fixes #1017) - #1023: Fix RC4-HMAC GSS MIC checksum to sign unpadded data (Fixes #1022) - #1025: Fix AS-REP hashcat formatter to reject unsupported AES etypes (Fixes #1024) - #1027: Fix Kerberoast doc example to use the account name for the AES salt (Fixes #1026) - #1030: Add built-in SPN service class recognition and HOST substitution (Fixes #1028) - #68: [bugfix] Drop QIODevice::Text from MCP read_file and write_file (#65) - #71: [bugfix] Release session container on tab close (#69) - #72: [enhancement] Release agent panel collapsible block map on Clear (#70) - #2: [enhancement] Improve macros and scripts
